calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
Arnold Evje II, Esq., for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Defendant, Richard Hollingsworth present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation, signed by the parties, but not read into the record.
Judgment pursuant to stipulation filed.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
